# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.

Prevent datastore security.
# Category: datastore_security

redis-master:
  image: redis:7-alpine
  command: >
    redis-server
    --requirepass ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
    --masterauth ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
    --min-slaves-to-write 1
    --min-slaves-max-lag 10
    --protected-mode yes
    --bind 0.0.0.0
    --tls-port 6380
    --port 0
    --tls-cert-file /tls/redis.crt
    --tls-key-file /tls/redis.key
    --tls-ca-cert-file /tls/ca.crt
    --tls-auth-clients yes
    --tls-replication yes
    --rename-command FLUSHALL ""
    --rename-command FLUSHDB ""
    --rename-command DEBUG ""
    --maxmemory 256mb
    --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    --loglevel notice
  volumes:
    - redis-master-data:/data
    - ./tls:/tls:ro
  networks:
    - redis-internal
  deploy:
    resources:
      limits:
        memory: 512M

redis-slave-1:
  image: redis:7-alpine
  command: >
    redis-server
    --replicaof redis-master 6380
    --requirepass ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
    --masterauth ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
    --protected-mode yes
    --bind 0.0.0.0
    --tls-port 6380
    --port 0
    --tls-cert-file /tls/redis.crt
    --tls-key-file /tls/redis.key
    --tls-ca-cert-file /tls/ca.crt
    --tls-auth-clients yes
    --tls-replication yes
    --rename-command FLUSHALL ""
    --rename-command FLUSHDB ""
    --rename-command DEBUG ""
    --replica-read-only yes
    --maxmemory 256mb
    --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    --loglevel notice
  volumes:
    - redis-slave1-data:/data
    - ./tls:/tls:ro
  networks:
    - redis-internal
  depends_on:
    - redis-master
  deploy:
    resources:
      limits:
        memory: 512M

redis-slave-2:
  image: redis:7-alpine
  command: >
    redis-server
    --replicaof redis-master 6380
    --requirepass ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
    --masterauth ${REDIS_PASSWORD}
    --protected-mode yes
    --bind 0.0.0.0
    --tls-port 6380
    --port 0
    --tls-cert-file /tls/redis.crt
    --tls-key-file /tls/redis.key
    --tls-ca-cert-file /tls/ca.crt
    --tls-auth-clients yes
    --tls-replication yes
    --rename-command FLUSHALL ""
    --rename-command FLUSHDB ""
    --rename-command DEBUG ""
    --replica-read-only yes
    --maxmemory 256mb
    --maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
    --loglevel notice
  volumes:
    - redis-slave2-data:/data
    - ./tls:/tls:ro
  networks:
    - redis-internal
  depends_on:
    - redis-master
  deploy:
    resources:
      limits:
        memory: 512M

volumes:
  redis-master-data:
  redis-slave1-data:
  redis-slave2-data:

networks:
  redis-internal:
    internal: true
